meaning: n.白兰地酒的一种(产于法国的Cognac)
examples: A little cognac slopped over the edge of the glass.
She had a habit of taking an occasional nip from a flask of cognac.
The drink originally got its name from a brand of French cognac named Sazerac-de-Forge et Fils.
Also in the wooden case is a bottle of 1896 Hennessy Very Special cognac.
